title: Sweden Application for Registration of a New Vehicle
description: Apply to the Swedish Transport Agency (Transportstyrelsen) to register a brand-new vehicle in Sweden's road traffic register (vägtrafikregistret), using Transportstyrelsen Form TS8003 ('Ansökan om registrering av ett nytt fordon | Application for registration of a new vehicle'). This form is used only for a genuinely new vehicle: one brought into Sweden by a Transportstyrelsen-approved registered importer, or one professionally manufactured in Sweden; a used vehicle, or a new vehicle lacking either of those two permits, instead requires an 'ursprungskontroll' (origin-check) application, which this document does not model. This is Sweden's first DMV-vertical schema; Sweden's other verticals are se/bolagsverket/aktiebolag-formation (Business Formation) and Passport/Taxes/Visa/National ID (not yet modelled). It does not submit anything or imply government endorsement.

source.documentRef: Transportstyrelsen Form TS8003, version 03.00, edition 2026-06-17 ('Ansökan om registrering av ett nytt fordon | Application for registration of a new vehicle'), the fillable AcroForm PDF linked from Transportstyrelsen's own vehicle-forms page

verification.notes: GOV-2063 'GovSchema Standard Research' research cycle. CATALOG.md's own closing note on se/bolagsverket/aktiebolag-formation (GOV-2056) flagged Sweden's other five verticals (Passport, DMV, Taxes, Visa, National ID) as open, unscreened backlog candidates; this cycle scouted all five and found DMV the strongest: Transportstyrelsen's TS8003 is a genuine 43-field fillable AcroForm PDF (4 pages), unauthenticated and directly downloadable with no BankID/CAPTCHA/login gate, and — like se/bolagsverket/aktiebolag-formation's own bilingual guide pages — carries the authority's own field-by-field instructions on pages 3-4 of the identical PDF, section-numbered to match the form fields on pages 1-2. The other four Swedish verticals were confirmed weaker: Skatteverket's income-tax return has moved to e-service-only with no current downloadable blank form or field guide (its own 'Dags att deklarera' guide brochure was discontinued); Polisen's passport process and Skatteverket/Polisen's national-ID-card process are both in-person/biometric-only with no home-fillable application; Migrationsverket's Schengen visa form (nos. 118031 SV/119031 EN) is a confirmed duplicate of the EU-harmonized template already published as fr/france-visas/schengen-visa-application. Extracted with pdfjs-dist (getFieldObjects()/page.getAnnotations() for all 43 AcroForm fields across pages 1-2, getTextContent() for the full text layer across all 4 pages); programmatically checked every annotation's fieldFlags bit 2 (the PDF Required flag): none of the 43 fields set it, the same 'form's own prose, not the PDF's Required bit, is the requiredness signal' pattern documented for se/bolagsverket/aktiebolag-formation and nl/kvk/bv-formation. Opens Sweden's DMV vertical (2 of 6 verticals now open). A mock conformance/se/transportstyrelsen/vehicle-registration-new-vehicle/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run (a Transportstyrelsen-approved importer bringing a new car into Sweden) was checked with a from-scratch script re-implementing this document's own required/requiredWhen condition grammar and passed with 0 errors; three mutation tests confirmed the typeApprovalNumber, creditEndDate, and financierOrgNumber conditional branches all fire correctly. Status remains 'draft' pending independent field-by-field re-review; see VERIFICATION.md for the full source table, extraction transcript, and every disclosed scope decision.

fields.name: originType
fields.label: How was the vehicle brought into being as a Swedish-registrable new vehicle?
fields.description: This form covers only these two origin cases for a genuinely new vehicle; a used vehicle, or a new vehicle lacking either permit, instead requires a separate 'ursprungskontroll' (origin-check) application, not modelled here.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §1: '(1.A.) Fordonet är infört från utlandet av registrerad importör | Imported from abroad by a registered importer' / '(1.B.) Fordonet är yrkesmässigt tillverkat i Sverige | Professionally manufactured in Sweden'; p.3 guide, item 1

fields.name: importerOrManufacturerOrgNumber
fields.label: Importer's or manufacturer's organisation number
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §1: 'Importörens eller tillverkarens organisationsnummer'

fields.name: importerOrManufacturerEmail
fields.label: Importer's or manufacturer's email address, for contact if vehicle-technical details are unclear
fields.description: The form's own guide states this email address is not stored in the road traffic register; it is used only for this case.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §1: 'Mejladress till importör eller tillverkare, för kontakt vid oklarheter om fordonstekniska uppgifter'

fields.name: importerOrManufacturerPhone
fields.label: Importer's or manufacturer's telephone number
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §1: 'Telefonnummer' (below the importer/manufacturer email field)

fields.name: ownerFullName
fields.label: Vehicle owner's surname and first name
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Uppgifter om fordonsägaren': 'Efternamn och förnamn'

fields.name: ownerIdOrOrgNumber
fields.label: Vehicle owner's personal identity number, or organisation number if the owner is a legal entity
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Uppgifter om fordonsägaren': 'Person- eller organisationsnummer'

fields.name: ownerPhone
fields.label: Vehicle owner's telephone number
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Uppgifter om fordonsägaren': 'Telefonnummer'

fields.name: ownerIsSameAsImporter
fields.label: Is the vehicle owner the same party as the registered importer?
fields.description: Only meaningful when the vehicle was imported by a registered importer; gates whether an import certificate or manufacturer's certificate must be attached (see documents[].importOrManufacturerCertificate).
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, p.3, item 1.A: 'Om ägaren är någon annan än den registrerade importören ska införselintyg eller tillverkarintyg bifogas (om inte CoC bifogats).'

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Vehicle type
fields.description: Coded per the form's own guide: Personbil (car) = PB, Lastbil (truck) = LB, Buss (bus) = BUSS, Släpvagn (trailer) = SLÄP, Traktor (tractor) = TR, Motorcykel (motorcycle) = MC, Moped klass I (class I moped) = MOPED, Motorredskap (motorised implement) = MRED, Terränghjuling (ATV) = TGHJUL, Snöskoter (snowmobile) = TGSNÖ, Terrängvagn (all-terrain vehicle/trailer) = TGV.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Fordonsslag'; p.3 guide, item 2: 'Fordonsslag anges enligt följande'

fields.name: makeType
fields.label: Make/type (Fabrikat/typ)
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Fabrikat/typ'

fields.name: baseVehicleMake
fields.label: Base vehicle's make, for a multi-stage type-approved vehicle
fields.description: Applies to vehicles approved for registration in multiple manufacturing stages (e.g. a chassis manufacturer's base vehicle later completed by a bodybuilder); out of scope for a single-stage vehicle.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Grundfordonets fabrikat'

fields.name: tradeDesignation
fields.label: Trade designation (Handelsbeteckning)
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Handelsbeteckning'

fields.name: makeCode
fields.label: Make code (Fabrikatskod), assigned by the registered importer or professional manufacturer
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Fabrikatskod'; p.3 guide: 'Fabrikatskod och gruppnummer anges av registrerad importör eller yrkesmässig tillverkare.'

fields.name: groupNumber
fields.label: Group number (Gruppnummer), assigned by the registered importer or professional manufacturer
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Gruppnummer'; p.3 guide: 'Fabrikatskod och gruppnummer anges av registrerad importör eller yrkesmässig tillverkare.'

fields.name: identificationNumber
fields.label: Identification number (chassis/frame/manufacturing number, i.e. VIN)
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Identifieringsnummer (chassi-/ram-/tillverkningsnummer)'

fields.name: manufactureYearMonthOrModelYear
fields.label: Manufacturing year and month, or model year
fields.description: Required to establish the vehicle's model year for every vehicle type except motorised implements (motorredskap), for which the form's own guide states this information is not required. A model year may additionally be given for a vehicle without EC type-approval.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Tillverkningsår och månad/ årsmodell'; p.4 guide: 'Uppgifterna krävs inte för motorredskap.'

fields.name: color
fields.label: Vehicle colour
fields.sourceRef: TS8003 §2: 'Färg'; p.3 guide: 'Färg anges enligt följande alternativ'

fields.name: technicalDataViaIndividualApproval
fields.label: Should the vehicle's technical data be registered via a single/individual approval (enskilt godkännande)?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Registrera tekniska data': 'Tekniska data ska registreras genom en registreringsbesiktning eller via enskilt godkännande. Ja'

fields.name: typeApprovalNumber
fields.label: Type-approval number for the vehicle's most recent manufacturing stage
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Registrera tekniska data': 'Om ja, ange typgodkännandenummer för fordonets senaste tillverkningssteg'

fields.name: technicalDataViaEcoc
fields.label: Should the vehicle's technical data be registered using an electronic Certificate of Conformity (eCoC/IVI)?
fields.description: When true, Transportstyrelsen retrieves the eCoC itself; it must not be attached to the application. When false and the vehicle instead has a paper-format Certificate of Conformity, that document must be attached (see documents[].certificateOfConformity).
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Registrera tekniska data': 'Tekniska data ska registreras med stöd av eCoC (IVI). Ja'; p.4 guide: 'Alla eCoC (IVI) hämtas av Transportstyrelsen och ska därför inte bifogas till ansökan.'

fields.name: plateOrdinaryFront
fields.label: Ordinary plate (520×110 mm), front
fields.description: Cars, trucks, and buses require two plates (front and back); other vehicle types require one plate of the size/format appropriate to the vehicle type.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Ordinarie skylt (520x110 mm)': 'Fram'; p.4 guide: 'Personbil, lastbil och buss ska ha två skyltar, övriga fordonsslag en skylt.'

fields.name: plateOrdinaryBack
fields.label: Ordinary plate (520×110 mm), back
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Ordinarie skylt (520x110 mm)': 'Bak'

fields.name: plateSmallFront
fields.label: Small plate (300×110 mm), front
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Liten skylt (300x110 mm)': 'Fram'

fields.name: plateSmallBack
fields.label: Small plate (300×110 mm), back
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Liten skylt (300x110 mm)': 'Bak'

fields.name: plateMcMoped
fields.label: Two-row plate (170×150 mm), for motorcycle/moped
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, '2-radig skylt (170x150mm)': 'MC/MOPED'

fields.name: plateSnowmobileAtv
fields.label: Self-adhesive plate (260×70 mm), for snowmobile/ATV
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Självhäftande skylt (260x70 mm)': 'TGSNÖ/TGHJUL'

fields.name: registrationCertificateRequested
fields.label: Should a registration certificate (registreringsbevis) be issued when this vehicle is registered?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Registreringsbevis ska utfärdas vid registrering av detta fordon': 'Ja' / 'Nej'

fields.name: endOfSeriesDispensationCaseNumber
fields.label: Case number (diarienummer), if the vehicle has been granted an end-of-series dispensation by Transportstyrelsen
fields.description: Applies only to a vehicle granted an end-of-series dispensation (slutseriedispens); a copy of Transportstyrelsen's decision must then be attached (see documents[].endOfSeriesDispensationDecision), and — if the dispensation was not issued to the applicant — a power of attorney is also required, which this document does not model.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Ange diarienummer om fordonet är beviljad slutseriedispens av Transporstyrelsen'

fields.name: putIntoServiceRequested
fields.label: Should the vehicle be put into service (påställd) upon registration?
fields.description: A vehicle is automatically taken out of service (avställt) upon registration; this checkbox requests it be put into service instead. Putting a vehicle into service (other than a trailer) requires it to be covered by traffic insurance, evidenced physically by the insurer's self-adhesive proof-of-insurance mark on the paper form itself, which this document does not model as a separate field.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Anmälan om påställning': 'Fordonet ska ställas på'; p.4 guide §3: 'Fordonet är automatiskt avställt vid registrering... För att en påställning ska ske krävs att det finns en trafikförsäkring (gäller inte släpfordon).'

fields.name: isLeasing
fields.label: Is the vehicle being registered under a leasing arrangement?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Anmälan om leasing eller kreditköp': 'Leasing'

fields.name: isCreditPurchase
fields.label: Is the vehicle being registered under a credit (hire) purchase arrangement?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Anmälan om leasing eller kreditköp': 'Kredit'

fields.name: creditEndDate
fields.label: Credit end date
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Anmälan om leasing eller kreditköp': 'Slutdatum för kredit'

fields.name: financierOrgNumber
fields.label: Lessor's or creditor's organisation number
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Anmälan om leasing eller kreditköp': 'Leasinggivarens eller kreditgivarens organisationsnummer'

fields.name: usedAsTrafficTractor
fields.label: Is the vehicle used as a traffic tractor (trafiktraktor)?
fields.description: Applicable to tractors, motorised implements, and heavy all-terrain vehicles/trailers drawn by them, whose usage classification affects roadworthiness-testing and vehicle-tax obligations.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)': 'Trafiktraktor'

fields.name: usedAsClass1ImplementMobileCrane
fields.label: Is the vehicle a class 1 motorised implement (e.g. mobile crane)?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)': 'Motorredskap klass 1 (mobilkranar mm)'

fields.name: usedAsHeavyTerrainVehicleTrafficTractor
fields.label: Is the vehicle a motorised implement or heavy all-terrain vehicle used as a traffic tractor?
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)': 'Motorredskap eller tung terrängvagn som (används som trafiktraktor)'

fields.name: otherInformation
fields.label: Other information for Transportstyrelsen
fields.description: For a tractor, motorised implement, or heavy all-terrain vehicle (and trailers drawn by them), describe how the vehicle is used, what it transports, whether it operates on public roads, and which vehicles draw it.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)': 'Övriga upplysningar'; p.2: 'Beskriv vad som transporteras, om transport äger rum på allmän väg och vilka fordon som dras av fordonet'

fields.name: signerPrintedName
fields.label: Printed name of the signer
fields.description: The form is signed by the importer or manufacturer (from §1), not necessarily the vehicle owner.
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Underskrift': 'Namnförtydligande'; 'Importörens eller tillverkarens underskrift'

fields.name: signaturePlace
fields.label: Place of signature
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Underskrift': 'Ort'

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Date of signature
fields.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Underskrift': 'Datum'

documents.label: Certificate of Conformity (CoC), paper format, original issue from the vehicle manufacturer
documents.sourceRef: TS8003, p.3: 'För övriga fordon, som har ett intyg om överensstämmelse (CoC) i pappersformat, ska detta bifogas till ansökan för att fordonet ska kunna registreras i vägtrafikregistret. CoC ska skickas in i originalutfärdande från fordonstillverkaren.'

documents.label: Import certificate or manufacturer's certificate, required when the owner is someone other than the registered importer, or whenever the vehicle was professionally manufactured in Sweden
documents.sourceRef: TS8003, p.3, item 1.A: 'Om ägaren är någon annan än den registrerade importören ska införselintyg eller tillverkarintyg bifogas (om inte CoC bifogats).'; item 1.B: 'Bifoga ett tillverkarintyg som visar att fordonet är tillverkat av den som har tillstånd.'

documents.label: Copy of Transportstyrelsen's end-of-series dispensation decision, required only for a vehicle granted an end-of-series dispensation (i.e. whenever endOfSeriesDispensationCaseNumber is filled in)
documents.sourceRef: TS8003, p.4: 'Om fordonet är beviljad slutseriedispens av Transportstyrelsen, ska diarienumret för den godkända ansökan om dispens anges och en kopia av Transportstyrelsens beslut bifogas till denna ansökan.'

documents.label: Signer's handwritten signature
documents.statement: The importer's or manufacturer's signature, dated and placed, as printed on the form's signature block.

steps.title: Technical data registration and number plates
Putting into service, leasing, and credit
